# k8s-client-and-quantity

controller k8s client QPS/burst/TCP/retry and reposerver quantity size limits

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/cmd-params/k8s-client-and-quantity` |

## Input

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  controller.k8s.client.qps: "50"
  controller.k8s.client.burst: "100"
  controller.k8s.tcp.timeout: 30s
  controller.k8s.tcp.keepalive: 30s
  controller.k8sclient.retry.max: "3"
  controller.k8sclient.retry.base.backoff: 100ms
  reposerver.max.combined.directory.manifests.size: 10M
  reposerver.streamed.manifest.max.tar.size: 100M
  reposerver.streamed.manifest.max.extracted.size: 1G
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  commitServer: {}
  controller:
    k8sClient:
      burst: 100
      qps: "50"
      retry:
        backoff:
          duration: 100ms
        max: 3
      tcp:
        keepAlive: 30s
        timeout: 30s
  repoServer:
    maxCombinedDirectoryManifestsSize: 10M
    streamedManifest:
      maxExtractedSize: 1G
      maxTarSize: 100M
  server: {}
```

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

  controller.k8s.client.qps: "50"
  controller.k8s.tcp.keepalive: 30s
  controller.k8s.tcp.timeout: 30s

  controller.k8sclient.retry.max: "3"

  reposerver.streamed.manifest.max.extracted.size: 1G
  reposerver.streamed.manifest.max.tar.size: 100M
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
